zh-CN.name: 字母N
zh-CN.intro: 字母N是英语字母表里的第十四个字母。它像一个小滑梯，也像两扇小门。我们经常在数字和单词里看到它！

story.title: 🔤字母N的冒险
story.body: 字母N是个爱探险的字母。它长着两条长长的腿，中间连着一道斜斜的滑梯。有一天，N走到花园里，看到小鸟在鸟巢（NEST）里唱歌，鼻子（NOSE）闻到花香。它开心地跳起来，说：“我的名字叫N，发‘嗯’的音！”小朋友们，伸出小手画一画：先写一竖，再写一斜，最后又是一竖。N真有趣，我们一起念：N, N, N！

knowledge.title: 字母N在字母表中排第几？
knowledge.body: 英语字母表有26个字母，N是第14个，正好在中间。它是个辅音字母，很多单词都有它，比如鼻子nose和小网net。

en.name: N
en.intro: The letter N is the fourteenth letter in the alphabet. It looks like a little slide or two small doors. We can see it in numbers and words!

story.title: 🔤The Adventure of Letter N
story.body: Letter N is an adventurous letter. It has two long legs with a diagonal slide in the middle. One day, N went to the garden and saw birds singing in a NEST, and its NOSE smelled flowers. It jumped happily and said, 'My name is N, pronounced /en/!' Children, stretch out your little hands and draw: first a vertical line, then a diagonal, then another vertical line. N is so fun! Let's say together: N, N, N!

knowledge.title: Where is N in the alphabet?
knowledge.body: The English alphabet has 26 letters, and N is the 14th, right in the middle. It's a consonant, and many words have it, like nose and net.
